examples: The illusionist has come to the remote town, at the invitation of an enthusiastic admirer who was a Scot with a flirtatious kilt.
He was an admirer of her grandfather's paintings.
He is a great admirer of Picasso's early paintings.
But it did have one small milestone for a longtime admirer of the band.
He thinks it is important enough to risk being belittled, even by an admirer, like me.
